description:
🕒 07:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-logcamp-bonomine-earlysummer/

【CANCELLED】This tour has been suspended due to organizer circumstances.

This tour would have taken you to the summit of Mt. Bonomine (棒ノ嶺), learning the basics of stream walking along the beautiful Shiratani Ravine route with its distinctive gorge terrain. Lunch and dinner would feature game meat (venison, boar, etc.) prepared by a specialist restaurant, with opportunities to learn about this traditional food source.

【Fee】¥23,000 per person (includes guide, lunch and dinner, insurance)

【Capacity】5 participants

【Guide】Tsuyoshi Shinohara – Japan Alpine Guide Association member, mountaineering guide stage III

【What to bring】20-litre backpack (with waterproof protection), full stream-walking gear, change of clothes, helmet, harness, mountaineering equipment, bus fare, bathing fee, train fare
location: 集合 西武池袋線「飯能駅」改札口
summary: 🎫 Tour cancelled: Stream walking on Mt. Bonomine's Gorge and Naguri River source hike with game meat dinner
